live image
updated

Awaiting your call — decisions that unblock the next move

Headline recommendation

Make registration + deploy + drift ONE declarative system

Today registration, blue/green deploy, and drift-detection are three separate mechanisms. The world-class move is a single human-friendly service.yaml per service in git (image · networks · domains · deploy strategy · backups · schedules · tool-consumers). The controller expands it into all 12 manifests and continuously reconciles desired-vs-actual, auto-healing drift. That's Flux/ArgoCD-for-your-Docker-mesh. The registration pipeline we just spec'd is the first half; deepening the reconciler (WP-1.1) is the second. Framing them as one loop is what turns a pile of tools into a platform.

Engineering review — improvements · nice-to-haves · new features
